origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. College of Arts and Sciences

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Undergraduate Arts and Sciences Honors theses from the classes of 1978-2019. Include compilers Alexander Spektor, Shanna Bar-Giora, Olubukola Gbadegesin, Nitchaya Vannasaeng, Matthew Keagle, David Kim, Adrianne Kroepsch, Naomi Slutzki, Abhishek Mistry, Amanda Garfinkel, Theresa Fives, Susan Moskwa, Diane Renbarger, Shankar Iyer, Sarah Lee, Kai Quek, Rachel Walsh, Mary Elizabeth Sutherland, Joshua Groffman, Yan Xiang Liang, Jessica Herlich, Kelly Jenks, Emily E. Clark, Alexander Rees-Jones, Elizabeth Turner, Elizabeth Ann VanDuyne (1995) and Michelle Gelshteyn (2013).

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: College of Arts and Sciences Honors Theses, #14-4-4115. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
